-  elementFocused 

Type Property# elementFocused

iOS 26.0+iPadOS 26.0+Mac Catalyst 26.0+tvOS 26.0+visionOS 26.0+watchOS 26.0+

```
static var elementFocused: NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIAccessibility.ElementFocusedMessage> { get }
```

Available when `Self` is `NotificationCenter.BaseMessageIdentifier<UIAccessibility.ElementFocusedMessage>`.## [See Also](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/elementfocused#see-also)

### [Identifying UIKit accessibility messages](/documentation/foundation/notificationcenter/messageidentifier/elementfocused#Identifying-UIKit-accessibility-messages)
